task_updates.executor_notes: Implemented DiscordTransport in agent_kit/transport/discord.py against PushTransport with lazy discord.py startup, MESSAGE_CONTENT intent, env token/whitelist support, DM-only handling, whitelist rejection logging, post/edit/download/fetch methods, and persist-first text/voice/image ingestion. Voice and image branches commit messages plus pending ingestion ledger rows in one transaction before download/blob/Groq/image-row IO; storage request_body includes deterministic_path and discord_attachment_url. Added the ingest_message_id idempotency-key branch to ledger derivation. Verification: tests/test_discord_transport.py passed, related ledger/tool/store modules passed, discord.py import is lazy, module is 376 lines, full `python -m pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with 49 tests, and leaked-prefix grep returned zero matches.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. DiscordTransport.on_message rejects non-DM messages, logs non-whitelisted DMs without replying, and voice/image branches persist the message plus pending ingestion ledger rows in one transaction before external IO; storage pending request_body includes both deterministic_path and discord_attachment_url. Tests cover text, voice, image, whitelist, and ingest idempotency.

Yes. The single tool-result construction site in loop.py now emits vision content blocks when media_type and image_bytes_b64 are present, while preserving the prior non-image tool result shape; tests verify the emitted image source block.
